title: TUI Phase 1: core scaffold + Issues tab with ratatui
description: Phase 1 TUI dashboard with ratatui 0.30 + crossterm 0.29. Tab trait, App struct, event loop, IssuesTab (list+detail+tree), PlaceholderTab. Migrated from crosslink/ subdir issue #1.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
comments.content: [plan] Implementing Phase 1 TUI dashboard with ratatui 0.30 + crossterm 0.29. Files: src/tui/mod.rs (Tab trait, App struct, event loop), src/tui/issues_tab.rs (list+detail views with sort/filter/search), src/tui/tabs.rs (PlaceholderTab), src/commands/tui.rs (CLI entry point).
